text.title: terraform-modules-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for terraform-modules-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using a single monolithic module that provisions VPC, subnets, security groups, ECS cluster, ECS services, RDS, and IAM roles in one directory.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Changes to the RDS parameter group force a full plan across all resources, making plan output unreadable. A bug in the VPC CIDR blocks can destroy the ECS service if the plan is applied carelessly.

failure-mode.description: Omitting validation blocks on variables that accept CIDRs, ARNs, or instance types.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Terraform passes invalid values straight to the provider, which surfaces an obscure API error instead of a clear error_message from the validation block.
